revision.text:
{{Location infobox | type = area | sector id = 1562 | waypoints = 1 | points-of-interest = 7 | vistas = 2 | within = Crystal Oasis | connections = [[Amnoon Farms]] (E)
[[The Sinking Ruins]] (N)
[[Mekele Bluffs]] (NE)
[[Amnoon Southern Outskirts]] (S)
[[Bay of Elon]] (W) | levels = 80 | requires = Path of Fire }} The [[Free City of Amnoon]] is a port town that was once called [[gw1:The Amnoon Oasis|The Amnoon Oasis]]. Previously a tiny town that was the last refuge for adventurers before heading into the [[Crystal Desert]], it is now situated near the base of the redirected [[Elon River]] before it flows into the [[Sea of Elon]] and has become a large, bustling [[Elona|Elonian]] city. It was rebuilt by [[Corsair]]s as a city for Elonians that wished to live freely from [[Palawa Joko]]'s empire.[[Jehan]][[The Sinking Ruins#Ambient dialogue|The Sinking Ruins ambient dialogue]] Ever since Joko's rise, defectors that manage to escape his walled empire have fled here to Amnoon. Over the past ten years, the citizens of Amnoon had issues with [[Branded]] to their north, but with [[Kralkatorrik]] moving southeast, the Branded began passing closer to them. The new [[Forged]] and now-fanatical [[Zaishen Order]] have also been bringing up troubles for them, as well. == Locations and objectives == ;Waypoints :{{map objective|waypoint|Amnoon Waypoint|id=2747}} ;Points of Interest :{{map objective|point of interest|Altar of the Six Gods}} :{{map objective|point of interest|Amnoon Cavalier Station}} :{{map objective|point of interest|Amnoon Civic Center}} :{{map objective|point of interest|Amnoon Emporium}} :{{map objective|point of interest|Amnoon Harbor}} :{{map objective|point of interest|Grand Sahil Casino}} :{{map objective|point of interest|The Empty Quarter}} ; Vistas : {{map objective|vista|Amnoon Harbor Vista|id=2692}} : {{map objective|vista|Free City of Amnoon Vista|id=2746}} ;Mastery Insights : {{map icon|masterypof}} [[Pot of Soup]] ;Landmarks :{{map objective|landmark|Lily of the Elon}} ;Instances :[[Office of the Chief Councilor]] :[[Zalambur's Office]] {{area events|show header=y}} == NPCs == === Allies === ;[[Awakened]] * [[Awakened Merchant]] ;[[Charr]] * [[Black Lion Bodyguard]] ;[[Dolyak]]s * [[Dolyak (NPC)|Dolyak]] * [[Pack Dolyak]] ;[[Feline]]s * [[Cat]] ;[[Human]]s * [[Amin]] * [[Apprentice Chef]] * [[Barback]] * [[Bartender (Amnoon)|Bartender]] * [[Bekir Maalum]] * [[Black Lion Trader]] * [[Cafe Barista]] * [[Cashier]] * [[Cashier Talum]] * [[Cavalier (NPC)|Cavalier]] * [[Chef (NPC)|Chef]] * [[Child]] * [[Citizen]] * [[Councilor]] * [[Dealer]] * [[Desert Bandit]] * [[Dishwasher]] * [[Dockmaster Jonnick]] * [[Fisher]] * [[Ghali Safwah]] * [[Herald Kehnan]] * [[Injured Noble]] * [[Injured Villager (Free City of Amnoon)|Injured Villager]] * [[Jehan]] * [[Laundress]] * [[Lieutenant Nudara]] * [[Lieutenant Sandrine]] * [[Maisoora]] * [[Master Chef Laraib]] * [[Merchant (NPC)|Merchant]] * [[Mikaeel the Trustworthy]] * [[Mourner]] * [[Musician]] * [[Naomi]] * [[Noble]] * [[Off Duty Cavalier]] * [[Officer Yumna]] * [[Order of Shadows Agent]] * [[Patron]] * [[Priest of Kormir]] * [[Priestess of Kormir]] * [[Radeyah]] * [[Refugee (Elonian)|Refugee]] * [[Refugee Farmworker]] * [[Sailor]] * [[Security Officer]] * [[Seraph Soldier]] * [[Ship Captain]] * [[Stablehand]] * [[Stablemaster]] * [[Troublemaker]] * [[Veteran Doorman Laith]] * [[Veteran Intimidator]] * [[Veteran Security Officer]] * [[Villager]] * [[Waiter]] * [[Waitress]] * [[Widower]] * [[Worker]] * [[Zafeer Casino Blitz Information]] * [[Zoeya]] ;[[Norn]] * [[Ketill]] ;[[Ogre]]s * [[Ogre Hunter]] ;[[Plant]]s * [[Choya Pup]] * [[Fighter (choya)|Fighter]] ;[[Saurian]]s * [[Azzam]] ;[[Skritt]] * [[Kilikki]] * [[Pirate Skritt Forager]] * [[Uttakkt]] ;Various * [[Priory Explorer]] * [[Priory Historian]] * [[Priory Researcher]] ==== Services ==== : {{vendor|scout}} [[Cavalier (scout)|Cavalier]] : {{vendor|casino blitz reward information}} [[Casino Blitz Reward Cashier]] : {{vendor|merchant}} [[Dealer (merchant)|Dealer]] : {{vendor|misc|Profession Scholar (map icon).png|Elona Guide Ebi}} [[Elona Guide Ebi]] : {{vendor|merchant}} [[Kazi]] : {{vendor|bank}} [[Merchant (banker)|Merchant]] : {{vendor|trading post}} [[Merchant (Trading Post)|Merchant]] : {{vendor|bounty hunter}} [[Order of Shadows Agent]] : {{vendor|merchant}} [[Yonca]] : {{vendor|merchant}} [[Merchant (Crystal Oasis Fishmonger)|Merchant]] [Fishmonger] : {{vendor|merchant}} [[Merchant (Crystal Oasis Fishing Supplies)|Merchant]] [Fishing Supplies] === Foes === ;[[Ambient creature]]s * [[Beetle]] * [[Crab]] * [[Crow]] * [[Prairie Dog]] * [[Rat]] * [[Trout]] * [[Vulture]] ;[[Animal]]s * [[Sand Eel]] * [[Veteran Sand Eel]] ;[[Bird]]s * [[Aggressive Vulture]] * [[Veteran Aggressive Vulture]] ;[[Crustacean]]s * [[Hermit Crab]] * [[Sea Turtle]] * [[Thundershrimp]] ;[[Devourer]]s * [[Arid Devourer]] * [[Veteran Arid Devourer]] ;[[Drake]]s * [[River Drake]] * [[River Drake Hatchling]] * [[Veteran River Drake]] ;[[Elemental]]s * [[Dust Mites]] ;[[Fish]] * [[Barracuda]] * [[Salmon]] * [[Tuna]] ;[[Human]]s * [[Troublemaker]] * [[Veteran Troublemaker]] ;[[Shark]]s * [[Sand Shark]] == Ambient dialogue == {{Section-stub|location|Casino Dealer commentates games}} ;Near the north exit from the city :'''Refugee:''' ''Is there any room in the camp by the harbor?'' :'''Cavalier:''' ''Oh, that's not a, uh... That is, the people living in those tents are citizens who were displaced by a sandstorm.'' :'''Refugee:''' ''Oh. That explains the silk sheets and fine furnishing in their tents.'' :'''Cavalier:''' ''I am truly sorry, for what little that's worth.'' :'''Cavalier:''' ''I'm sorry we're having trouble finding room for all of you.'' :'''Refugee:''' ''There's an unpopulated area just north of your harbor.'' :'''Refugee:''' ''That neighborhood has outcroppings that could block the wind for our tents. We'd be out of everyone's way...'' :'''Cavalier:''' ''I'm afraid the No—that quarter is unsafe for habitation. A major sandstorm forced us to evacuate the residents.'' :'''Cavalier:''' ''We're hoping to dig it out and return those citizens to their homes, once we have the time and resources available.'' ;Near the east exit from the city :'''Merchant (1):''' ''Is there any profit in trading these days?'' :'''Merchant (2):''' ''Once we only had to worry about paying our protection money to the [[Hamaseen]] and our taxes to the [[Amnoon's City Council|council]].'' :'''Merchant (2):''' ''Then came the [[Branded]] migration across our northern trade routes.'' :'''Merchant (1):''' ''Only the foolish waded across the [[Elon River|Elon]] and into the madness of [[Palawa Joko|King Joko]]'s tariff enforcement.'' :'''Merchant (1):''' ''Now we have [[Forged]] closing off our trading routes in every direction.'' :'''Merchant (2):''' ''Maybe the stories are true that [[Zalambur]] is a [[djinn]], that's just playing at being a man.'' :'''Merchant (1):''' ''Sorcery alone could explain how he manages to move so much product under these conditions.'' :'''Refugee (1):''' ''Look at the little ones, laughing and running without a care.'' :'''Refugee (2):''' ''Let's just hope we can find real homes before they're old enough to know better.'' :'''Cavalier (scout):''' ''Ahai, outlander! Let me know if you need help getting your bearings.'' :''Cavalier waves at .'' ;In the middle of the city :(if supported independence in [[Blazing a Trail]]) :'''Noble:''' ''The [[Amnoon's City Council|council]] is really stepping up recruitment for the city watch. Sounds like they intend to to reject [[Joko]]'s alliance.'' :'''Villager:''' ''That, or they intend to crack down on [[Zalambur]]. Everything those politicians do is two-faced.'' :'''Noble:''' ''What, and Zalambur isn't? We all know what his real business is.'' :'''Noble:''' ''Admit it — the Council stood their ground. They're stronger than you thought they were.'' :'''Villager:''' ''We'll see.'' :(if supported the Sunspears in [[Blazing a Trail]]) :'''Noble:''' ''Did you hear the news? Amnoon is to become a sanctuary for all [[Sunspear]] survivors.'' :'''Villager:''' ''Sounds to me like our [[Amnoon's City Council|council]] is just taking on even more responsibility.'' :'''Noble:''' ''Just a while ago you were worried they were going to invite [[Joko]] in. Now that will clearly never happen.'' :'''Villager:''' ''I was worried the council would fail to put it's {{sic|its}} own citizens first, as [[Zalambur]] does. And they did.'' :'''Noble:''' ''(sigh) There is really no pleasing you, is there?'' ;Near waypoint :(if supported independence in [[Blazing a Trail]]) :'''Noble (1):''' ''The [[Amnoon's City Council|Council]] made the right call. Amnoon is and always should be a free city.'' :'''Noble (2):''' ''I can finally sleep at night.'' :(if supported independence in [[Blazing a Trail]]) :'''Noble (1):''' ''I never thought I'd be happy to see so many [[cavaliers]] around the city.'' :'''Noble (2):''' ''I can finally sleep at night.'' ;At the tents near the [[Amnoon Cavalier Station|Cavalier Station]] :'''Refugee (1):''' ''So much seafood...'' :'''Refugee (1):''' ''I'd never seen a fish before we reached the coast; now I eat one for every meal.'' :'''Refugee (2):''' ''I guess it's what they have in abundance to give us here.'' :'''Refugee (1):''' ''We're fortunate to be fed at all.'' :'''Priory Explorer:''' ''Ahai there. Did you happen to come from the south?'' :'''Refugee:''' ''That's right. I came from the [[Elon Riverlands]].'' :'''Priory Explorer:''' ''May I ask you a few questions about modern [[Elona]], on behalf of the [[Durmand Priory]]?'' :'''Refugee:''' ''I'm afraid I won't be much help to you. My entire family was exiled from the kingdom when I was a child.'' :'''Priory Explorer:''' ''Exiled... Am I correct in understanding that you left [[Palawa Joko]]'s dominion unwillingly?'' :'''Refugee:''' ''My parents' sedition cost us any chance to ever be [[Awakened]]. We were sent to the work farms outside [[the Bone Wall]].'' :'''Priory Explorer:''' ''You regret losing a chance to join an army of the [[undead]]?'' :'''Refugee:''' ''King Joko Awakens his citizens to care for and protect their families forever. His greatest blessing, now lost to us...'' :'''Priory Explorer:''' ''I, uh... I'm sorry to hear that. Thank you for your time.'' ;At a fountain at the south exit from the city :'''Villager (1):''' ''I heard the [[Amnoon's City Council|council]] is planning to raise water rates to make emergency infrastructure repairs.'' :'''Villager (2):''' ''Typical. They wait until the system is falling apart before addressing any issues.'' :'''Villager (1):''' ''I don't think that's it, not this time. There were rumors of sabotage...'' :'''Villager (2):''' ''You really buy that? Who's crazy enough to sabotage the fresh water supply in a [[Crystal Desert|desert]]?'' :'''Villager (1):''' ''Higher rates aside, I hope they manage to get our water running again soon.'' :'''Villager (2):''' ''I hope it's nothing more serious than the leaks we keep hearing about.'' :(if supported Joko in [[Blazing a Trail]]) :'''Citizen (1):''' ''I'll never get used to seeing [[Awakened]] in the city.'' :'''Citizen (2):''' ''They're like vultures. Disgusting. Did you hear they trashed the [[Grand Sahil Casino|casino]]?'' :(if supported independence in [[Blazing a Trail]]) :'''Citizen (1):''' ''The [[cavaliers]] can barely swing a sword, much less win a fight!'' :'''Citizen (2):''' ''We should flee to [[Lion's Arch]] while we still can.'' :(A random combination of one line from each Citizen, if supported the Sunspears in [[Blazing a Trail]]) :'''Citizen (1):''' ''[[Joko]] is probably stewing on his throne of bones somewhere.'' :'''Citizen (1):''' ''There aren't enough of them. We're done for.'' :'''Citizen (2):''' ''We may as well paint a giant, Sunspear-shaped target on our foreheads.''{{verify|This line only started appearing for me after finishing PoF's story. Confirm or correct?}} :'''Citizen (2):''' ''I knew allying with the Sunspears was a huge mistake.'' :Two kids following a female sylvari Priory Researcher around. :'''Child (1):''' ''What is it?'' :'''Child (2):''' ''Look at that outlander!'' :'''Child (2):''' ''It's like he's made out of leaves and bark.'' :'''Child (1):''' ''Where are all these strange people coming from?'' ;At the aqueduct south of the city :'''Refugee (1):''' ''I can't get used to seeing highlanders riding their [[Springer|hopping beasts]].'' :'''Refugee (2):''' ''What must it be like in the [[Desert Highlands|north]], that they'd consider taming those...things just to get around!'' :'''Refugee (1):''' ''I hadn't thought about that. Must be some treacherous terrain up that way.'' :'''Refugee (2):''' ''Great chasms, steep and jagged cliffs...'' :'''Refugee (2):''' ''Imagine clinging to one of those beasts as it jumps up a sheer cliff wall...'' :'''Refugee (1):''' ''Maybe we're lucky after all, to be where we are in this [[Crystal Oasis|oasis]].'' :'''Refugee (2):''' ''Only you could find a bright side to our situation.'' :'''Refugee (3):''' ''If we ever want to be self-reliant, we'll need to find work.'' :'''Refugee (4):''' ''Will these people even let us work, without citizenship?'' :'''Refugee (3):''' ''I hear there's a great need for laborers in the [[Grand Sahil Casino|casino]], the farms, the [[Talatat Quarry|quarry]]...'' :'''Refugee (4):''' ''There's also the Hamaseen. They've been recruiting around here...'' :'''Refugee (3):''' ''After all that [[Kormir]]'s [[Church of Kormir|priesthood]] has done for us, how could any of our people disrespect them like that?'' :'''Child:''' ''Poor dolyaks, stuck in that dumb old pen.'' :'''Child:''' ''I'm gonna go play with them again. (giggle)'' ;At the harbor :'''Child:''' ''Mama, are we refugees now?'' :'''Noble:''' ''No, love. We just... have to live in tents until they can dig out our homes again.'' :'''Child:''' ''But the refugees are living in tents too, just like us.'' :'''Noble:''' ''We're just temporarily inconvenienced. They're going to dig our homes out for us soon, you'll see.'' :'''Noble (1):''' ''This waiting around is unbearable. Our precious family heirlooms are somewhere in our home, under all that sand.'' :'''Noble (2):''' ''We seem to be a lesser priority to our [[Amnoon's City Council|council]] than those...refugees.'' :'''Noble (1):''' ''Oh, I plan to petition our Chief Councilor and remind her who funded and furnished those posh offices of hers.'' :'''Noble (2):''' ''Do you think [[Chief Councilor Imann|Imann]] will actually respond?'' :'''Noble (1):''' ''She will, or I'll know why. I don't understand how she could have forgotten she's one of us.'' :'''Noble:''' ''Why is there still no plan to get rid of all the sand burying our homes?'' :'''Cavalier:''' ''I'm afraid that's a question for our [[Amnoon's City Council|city council]], but sandstorm damage to your quarters was worse than initial estimates.'' :'''Cavalier:''' ''Amnoon's agencies and services are currently strained by multiple crises. Please try to remain patient.'' :'''Noble:''' ''My patience is running out. My taxes fund our council. Why are they wasting our resources on indigent refugees?'' :'''Noble:''' ''Why can't we set them up with some shovels; get them to work off their debt to us?'' :'''Cavalier:''' ''Why not bring your suggestion to [[Kormir]]'s [[Church of Kormir|priesthood]]? You'll find them caring for our less fortunate guests.'' :'''Noble:''' ''(grumble)'' :'''Priory Magister:''' ''Before each of you splits off in pursuit of your pet research subject, let's make sure we coordinate our efforts.'' :'''Priory Scholar:''' ''My thesis is on comparative governance. Should I start with Amnoon's councilors, or nomadic tribal chiefs up north?'' :'''Priory Magister:''' ''Well, let's give that some thought. What if—'' :'''Priory Scholar:''' ''Oh, but there are also the clan marshals to the south. Could there still be merchant princes in [[Palawa Joko]]'s [[Domain of Vabbi|Vabbi]]?'' :'''Priory Historian:''' ''Well, I'm off to [[Augury Rock]] to see if anyone is still seeking [[Ascension]] there.'' :'''Priory Magister:''' ''(growl) None of you are going anywhere until I—'' :'''Priory Explorer:''' ''I need to see for myself where [[Glint]] fell and inspired her [[Zephyrites|Zephyrite]] followers to take to the skies.'' :'''Priory Magister:''' ''(sigh) Fine. I'll make sure to record your intended destinations, so we can notify your next of kin.'' :'''Priory Researcher:''' ''These people have some refreshingly divergent ideas about ship design. Look at the draft on that hull.'' :'''Priory Historian:''' ''I see more than a bit of corsair influence.'' :'''Priory Researcher:''' ''I'd be interested to hear the advantage to those sail shapes.'' :'''Priory Historian:''' ''Think we could arrange a ride aboard one of these?'' :(if supported independence in [[Blazing a Trail]]) :'''Citizen:''' ''[[Captain Rahim|Rahim]]'s [[cavaliers]] are too green. They'll get us all killed!'' :'''Fisher:''' ''We should flee to [[Lion's Arch]] while we still can.'' :'''Citizen:''' ''We should've asked [[Joko]] for help instead of relying on the [[cavaliers]]. We're done for!'' :'''Fisher:''' ''Yeah, we're totally going to die.'' :'''Citizen:''' ''The cavaliers can barely swing a [[sword]], much less win a fight!'' :'''Fisher:''' ''Yeah, we're totally going to die.'' :'''Fisher:''' ''[[Joko]] is probably stewing on his throne of bones somewhere.'' :'''Citizen:''' ''First Joko will kill the [[Order of the Sunspears|Sunspears]], then us.'' ;Under the big fish in the harbor :'''Naomi:''' ''Nice catch, gentlemen. As fine a fish as I've ever seen.'' :'''Fisher (1):''' ''Wasn't easy. She fought me all the way in.'' :'''Fisher (2):''' ''There were five of us out on that boat with you, fighting that fish.'' :'''Fisher (2):''' ''If anything, you almost lost us the fish, when you dropped the gaff.'' :'''Naomi:''' ''Moving on—if you'll just stand by your catch there, I can capture this moment of pride for you. Yes?'' :'''Naomi:''' ''That's it. You both look heroic. Just hold still, if you would...'' :'''Fisher (1):''' ''Can we move yet? I didn't know this would take so long.'' :'''Naomi:''' ''No, please don't move yet.'' :'''Fisher (1):''' ''...Uh, do you have a bucket?'' :'''Fisher (2):''' ''Are you almost done?'' :'''Naomi:''' ''I'm finished. Thank you for your patience.'' :'''Fisher (2):''' ''(grumble) :'''Naomi:''' ''Who else wants their portrait painted with this fearsome sea dweller?'' :'''Child:''' ''Ooh! Mama, can I?'' :'''Villager:''' ''No. No, I don't think so, sweetie.'' :'''Child:''' ''Look, Mama—bet it could eat me right up!'' :'''Villager:''' ''Come away from that awful thing, right now.'' :'''Child:''' ''Yes, Mama.'' :'''Naomi:''' ''It would only take me a moment to paint her...'' ;When leaving the harbor to the north :'''Cavalier:''' ''Enter at your own risk, outlander.'' :'''Cavalier:''' ''The quarter was evacuated after a recent sandstorm.'' :'''Cavalier:''' ''Nothing to see but sand and predators.'' ;At the merchant stand near the [[Grand Sahil Casino|Casino]] :'''Priory Scholar:''' ''Excuse me sir, can you speak?'' :'''[[Awakened]] Merchant:''' ''Praise [[Joko]]. You buy?'' :'''Priory Scholar:''' ''I may do just that, but may I ask a few questions first?'' :'''Awakened Merchant:''' ''You buy.'' :'''Priory Scholar:''' ''You praised Palawa Joko just now. For granting you awareness, reanimating you?'' :'''Awakened Merchant:''' ''You buy.'' :'''Priory Scholar:''' ''I see. What brought you all the way here from [[Elona]] to ply your wares?'' :'''Awakened Merchant:''' ''You buy now.'' :'''Priory Scholar:''' ''Yes, of course. Uh... would it be possible to get a receipt of purchase, so that I can expense it to the [[Priory]]?'' :'''Awakened Merchant:''' ''No.'' ;Near [[Grand Sahil Casino]] :(if supported independence in [[Blazing a Trail]]) :'''Citizen (1):''' ''We should've asked [[Joko]] for help instead of relying on the [[cavaliers]]. We're done for!'' :'''Citizen (2):''' ''Doesn't matter. Soon enough we'll either be bowing to [[Balthazar]] or kissing Joko's wrinkly behind. Pick your future master.'' :'''Citizen (2):''' ''Better to stay independent than to bed down with the likes of Joko.'' :'''Citizen (2):''' ''We're in [[Captain Rahim]]'s capable hands. His cavaliers will protect us.'' :'''Citizen (1):''' ''I never thought I'd be happy to see so many [[cavaliers]] around the city.'' :'''Citizen (2):''' ''We're in [[Captain Rahim]]'s capable hands. His cavaliers will protect us.'' ;At Grand Sahil Casino :'''Patron:''' ''Another [[harpy]]. I'm out.'' :'''Patron:''' ''I swear this game is rigged.'' :'''Patron:''' ''(groan)'' :'''Patron:''' ''[[Grenth]] take me. What was I thinking?'' :'''Patron:''' ''One last round. I can’t lose every time.'' :'''Dealer:''' ''Draw your cards, ladies and gentlemen.'' :'''Dealer:''' ''Pyramid. Broken spear. And...the [[dragon]].'' :'''Dealer:''' ''Dragon consumes all. House wins.'' :'''Dealer:''' ''Any last bets? No?'' :'''Dealer:''' ''Let's see what we have. Crystal. [[Hydra]]. Oh, and there's a [[Joko]].'' :'''Dealer:''' ''Joko conquers. Thank you for playing.'' :'''Ogre Hunter (1):''' ''These creatures have spirit. Think [[choya]] could make good [[pet]]s?'' :'''Ogre Hunter (2):''' ''(laugh) Not a chance.'' :'''Ogre Hunter (3):''' ''Nasty, foul pests. Easier to tame the [[Branded]].'' :'''Ogre Hunter (2):''' ''They say choya will eat their own.'' :'''Ogre Hunter (3):''' ''Also, they explode when they die.'' :'''Ogre Hunter (1):''' ''Guess you're right. They'd just foul up our [[kraal]].'' :'''Veteran Intimidator:''' ''How's recruitment going in the camps?'' :'''Troublemaker:''' ''It was going better before we had competition from the [[Zaishen Order|Zaishen]].'' :'''Veteran Intimidator:''' ''It's true—[[Balthazar]]'s fanatics are out there trying to conscript our talent now.'' :'''Veteran Intimidator:''' ''(groan) Bad enough that fool [[Chief Councilor Imann|Imann]] invited Joko's Awakened filth here. Now we have to chase off the false [[Six Human Gods|god]]'s zealots!'' :'''If asura:''' ::'''Veteran Intimidator:''' ''Hold on—I think the little outlander is listening to us.'' :'''If human:''' ::'''Veteran Intimidator:''' ''Hold on—I think the outlander is listening to us.'' :'''If sylvari:''' ::'''Veteran Intimidator:''' ''Hold on—I think the outlander freak is listening to us.'' :'''If norn:''' ::'''Veteran Intimidator:''' ''Hold on—I think the outlander brute is listening to us.'' :'''If charr:''' ::'''Veteran Intimidator:''' ''Hold on—I think the charr outlander is listening to us.'' :'''Veteran Intimidator:''' ''So all is well, then?'' :'''Troublemaker (1):''' ''That's right. Our trading partners seem happy.'' :'''Troublemaker (2):''' ''Nothing out of the ordinary to report.'' :'''Veteran Intimidator:''' ''Good, good. Glad to hear it.'' ;At Amnoon Civic Center :'''Villager''': ''Maybe with all these outlanders arriving, the council won't need to beg [[Joko]] to defend us.'' :'''Noble''': ''What are you talking about? Our [[Amnoon's City Council|council]]'s kept this city free all these years—why would they betray us now?'' :'''Noble''': ''You've been listening to too much of [[Zalambur]]'s nonsense.'' :'''Noble''': ''Any good he manages to do is just for public relations. We have to trust [[Chief Councilor Imann|Imann]] and our council.'' :'''Villager''': ''Your family and friends lost your homes to the sandstorm, and she's yet to do anything for any of you.'' :'''Noble''': ''Our situation can wait. There are others in greater need right now.'' :(if supported Joko in [[Blazing a Trail]]) :'''Noble''': ''I...I can hardly believe it. This can't be true.'' :'''Villager:''' ''You're not seeing things. Our city is plastered with the banners of the [[Awakened]].'' :'''Villager:''' ''I told you this would happen. Only [[Zalambur]] stands against [[Joko]] now. [[Chief Councilor Imann|Imann]]'s council was too weak.'' :'''Noble''': ''Well, it's not all bad. With Awakened help, we'll finally be able to deal with all our crises.'' :'''Noble''': ''Yes, yes. Imann is making the hard choices, but she is still looking out for our best interests.'' :'''Villager:''' ''You're hopeless.'' ;At Amnoon Emporium :(if supported Joko in [[Blazing a Trail]]) :'''Noble (1):''' ''Oddly enough, I feel safer with the [[Awakened]] around.'' :'''Noble (2):''' ''War makes strange bedfellows. We can trust them—for now.'' :(if supported the Sunspears in [[Blazing a Trail]], a random combination of one line from each Noble) :'''Noble (1):''' ''Allying with the [[Sunspear]]s gives us all a fighting chance.'' :'''Noble (1):''' ''The [[Amnoon's City Council|Council]] made the right call.'' :'''Noble (1):''' ''The Sunspears aren't much of an army, but they are an inspiration.'' :'''Noble (2):''' ''Anything is better than relying on [[Joko]].'' :'''Noble (2):''' ''At least the [[Church of Kormir|priesthood]] can look after the refugees.'' :'''Noble (2):''' ''Hey, one Sunspear is worth ten [[cavaliers]]. Just don't tell [[Captain Rahim|Rahim]] I said that.'' :(if supported independence in Blazing a Trail) :'''Noble (1):''' ''The Council made the right call. Amnoon is and always should be a free city.'' :'''Noble (2):''' ''We're in Captain Rahim's capable hands. His cavaliers will protect us'' ;Inside Amnoon Emporium when [[Help Talib recover his escaped sand shark pups]] [[Dynamic event|event]] is active :'''Herald Kehnan:''' ''Free people of Amnoon, a fellow citizen needs your help!'' :'''Herald Kehnan:''' ''[[Talib]] asks your help rounding up [[Sand Shark Pup|sand-shark pups]] that escaped his exotic animal ranch.'' :'''Herald Kehnan:''' ''Until the pups can be recovered, protect your toes when crossing the sands.'' ;Inside Amnoon Emporium when [[Stop the stampede of choya before they break down the gate]] [[Dynamic event|event]] is active :'''Herald Kehnan:''' ''[[Choya]] are storming our eastern gate! The [[cavalier]] guards need reinforcements.'' ;Inside Amnoon Emporium when [[Recover the sunken Consortium cargo polluting Amnoon's harbor]] [[Dynamic event|event]] is active :'''Herald Kehnan:''' ''Free citizens of Amnoon, your council needs you!'' :'''Herald Kehnan:''' ''A foreign ship has spilled cargo in our harbor, and your help is needed with the cleanup effort.'' :'''Herald Kehnan:''' ''Come speak with me for more information.'' ;Inside Amnoon Emporium when [[Defend the Water Authority facility workers as they repair damaged water pipes]] [[Dynamic event|event]] is active :'''Herald Kehnan:''' ''Free citizens of Amnoon, your council needs you!'' :'''Herald Kehnan:''' ''Your council is concerned for the safety of our brave [[Amnoon Water Authority|Water Authority]] employees who are working hard on facility repairs.'' :'''Herald Kehnan:''' ''Come speak with me for more information.'' ;Inside Amnoon Emporium when [[Defend the Amnoon farm workers from the Forged]] event is active :'''Herald Kehnan:''' ''Free citizens of Amnoon, your council needs you!'' :'''Herald Kehnan:''' ''We're hearing reports of [[Forged]] attacks on our farm workers out in the fields.'' :'''Herald Kehnan:''' ''Come speak with me for more information.'' ;Inside Amnoon Emporium when [[Help Salima gather stone and protect quarriers from the choya]] event is active :'''Herald Kehnan:''' ''Free citizens of Amnoon, your council needs you!'' :'''Herald Kehnan:''' ''To address our recent population explosion, the philanthropist [[Zalambur]] has pledged funding for new public housing.'' :'''Herald Kehnan:''' ''Stone is being quarried in the north for this project, despite hazardous working conditions posed by [[choya]].'' :'''Herald Kehnan:''' ''Come speak with me for more information.'' ;Inside Amnoon Cavalier Station :'''Cavalier:''' ''Get out, you! Go on.'' :'''Cavalier:''' ''Pop up around here again, and I'll have to arrest you!'' :'''Prisoner:''' ''Might as well let me out. I won't be in here long, anyway.'' :'''Cavalier:''' ''You were caught stealing [[Raptor (NPC)|raptor]]s. You're going to be in there for a while.'' :'''Prisoner:''' ''You're making a big mistake.'' :'''Prisoner:''' ''I have powerful friends. You don't want to cross the [[Hamaseen]].'' :'''Cavalier:''' ''If you were with the Hamaseen, you wouldn't be in here in the first place.'' :'''Prisoner:''' ''[[Zalambur]] will make you sorry for disrespecting me like this.'' :'''Cavalier:''' ''Oh. Well, if you're willing to go on record tying Zalambur to the Hamaseen, maybe we can work something out after all...'' :'''Prisoner:''' ''W-wait, now. I— I never said anything like that. I'm fine. I'm fine in here for now.'' :'''Cavalier:''' ''Really? I thought you'd say that.'' ;Near Bounty Board :'''Order of Shadows Agent:''' ''Reports of creatures driven insane by [[Ley line|ley energy]] are coming from all over. Are you going to help?'' :'''Order of Shadows Agent:''' ''The [[iboga]] [[Champion Tazula Mindclouder|Tazula Mindclouder]] is infamous. Who will erase its name from our board?'' :'''Order of Shadows Agent:''' ''They call him the [[Champion Forged Maverick|Forged Maverick]]. Track him down and save countless lives.'' :'''Order of Shadows Agent:''' ''Ley-crazed [[Champion Zelke the Shameless|Zelke]] is the last thug I'd want to meet in a dark alley. How about you? '' :'''Order of Shadows Agent:''' ''Need something to brag about? Tell your friends about the time you took down the [[Champion Man-Eater|Man-Eater]].'' :'''Order of Shadows Agent:''' ''Are you strong? Fearless? Take the bounty on [[Champion Braek Baredfang|Braek Baredfang]] and prove it.'' :'''Order of Shadows Agent:''' ''A [[Legendary Distraught Choya|legendary bounty]] just went up. Bring your choya-fighting gear.'' == Objects == * [[Apple Pie (object)|Apple Pie]] * [[Bleached Bones]] * [[Burnt Wood]] * [[Cactus Meat]] * [[Chicken Stock]] * [[Coconuts]] * [[Cowrie League Trade Cache]] * [[Flour]] * [[Glorious Elonian Chest]] * [[Hamaseen Trade Cache]] * [[Honey]] * [[Iboga Petals (object)|Iboga Petals]] * [[Jar of Wolf Pheromones (object)|Jar of Wolf Pheromones]] * [[Lost Chest]] * [[Marinated Shark Meat]] * [[Memorial to Deputy Qais]] ''(Only after finishing [[Eye of the Brandstorm]])'' * [[Orrian Gulper]] * [[Pot of Soup]] * [[Roasted Meat]] * [[Secret Sauce]] * [[Ship to Istan]] * [[Shiverpeak Salmon]] * [[Slab of Boar Meat]] * [[Spiky Fruit (object)|Spiky Fruit]] * [[Water (Crystal Desert)|Water]] * [[Yellowfin Tuna]] == Crafting resources == ;Fishing nodes : {{gathering node|Desert Fish}} ;Resource nodes : {{gathering node|Mithril Ore (node)|Mithril Ore}} : {{gathering node|Orichalcum Ore (node)|Orichalcum Ore}} : {{gathering node|Mebahya Sapling}} : {{gathering node|Ancient Sapling}} : {{gathering node|Cluster of Desert Herbs}} : {{gathering node|Desert Vegetables}} : {{gathering node|Lentils}} ;Bulk ingredients : {{icon|chef}} [[Cemil]] :: {{item icon|Basil Leaves in Bulk}} :: {{item icon|Bell Peppers in Bulk}} :: {{item icon|Buttermilk in Bulk}} :: {{item icon|Cheese Wedges in Bulk}} :: {{item icon|Ginger Root in Bulk}} :: {{item icon|Rice in Bulk}} :: {{item icon|Sour Cream in Bulk}} :: {{item icon|Tomatoes in Bulk}} :: {{item icon|Yeast in Bulk}} == Gallery == Amnoon emblem.png|The emblem of Amnoon, as seen on a banner at a [[Tyrian Alliance]] [[Prologue: The Tyrian Alliance|meeting]]. == Trivia == {{gww|The Amnoon Oasis}} * A [[gww:Guild Wars Prophecies|Guild Wars Prophecies]] song can be heard while in the city. The soundtrack is Crystal Oasis. == References == {{Crystal Oasis nav}} [[Category:Free City of Amnoon|*]] [[de:Freie Stadt Amnoon]] [[es:Ciudad Libre de Amnoon]] [[fr:Ville libre d'Amnoon]]

{{otheruses|the zone|the achievement category|Crystal Oasis (achievements)}} {{Location infobox | hearts = 4 | waypoints = 3 | points-of-interest = 30 | hero challenges = 5 | vistas = 10 | levels = 80 | within = Crystal Desert | location tree = Elona; Crystal Desert | type = zone | objectives = y | id = 1210 | region id = 12 | continent id = 1 | pets = [[Juvenile Sand Lion|Sand Lion]] | requires = pof | connections = [[Desert Highlands]] (NE)
[[Elon Riverlands]] (SE) }} The [[Crystal Oasis]] is a [[zone]] in the [[Crystal Desert]]. It was once a desert but since the diversion of the [[Elon River]] into the Crystal Desert, the vegetation has grown and life in the oasis is now prosperous. The area is inhabited by [[Elona|Elonians]] who have escaped the yoke of the Kingdom of [[Palawa Joko]] and have founded the [[Free City of Amnoon]], as well as a [[Temple of Kormir]]. Several pyramids can be seen in the landscape, among them [[the Teratohedron]], whose origin is unknown. == Getting there == * Complete the [[Story]] mission [[Sparking the Flame]] from [[Path of Fire]] (The ship will stay there after in [[Lion's Arch]] near [[Phoenix Roost]] for later use). * The [[Lionguard Aircrew (Transport Facilitator)|Lionguard Aircrew]] at [[Sanctum Harbor]] in [[Lion's Arch]] will take here any character who has already unlocked this zone through the storyline. * Use the [[Gem Store]] item {{item icon|Invitation to "Lily of the Elon"}}. == Map completion == * Chance at one of the following: ** {{rewards item|Black Lion Chest Key|chance=chance}} ** {{rewards item|Transmutation Charge (item)|chance=chance}} * One of the following, depending on your profession: ** {{rewards item|Firebrand's Cache|profession=Guardian}} ** {{rewards item|Renegade's Cache|profession=Revenant}} ** {{rewards item|Spellbreaker's Cache|profession=Warrior}} ** {{rewards item|Holosmith's Cache|profession=Engineer}} ** {{rewards item|Soulbeast's Cache|profession=Ranger}} ** {{rewards item|Deadeye's Cache|profession=Thief}} ** {{rewards item|Weaver's Cache|profession=Elementalist}} ** {{rewards item|Mirage's Cache|profession=Mesmer}} ** {{rewards item|Scourge's Cache|profession=Necromancer}} * 8001 {{experience}} == Locations == {| {{STDT|sortable icon|raptor}} [[Raptor|Mount: Raptor]] |} == Interactive map == {{Interactive map}} == Events == {{Event timer|pof-co}} ;Meta events * [[Casino Blitz]] ** {{event|Collect as many casino coins as possible before time runs out!}} '''Round 1''' *** {{event|Clear out the gang of troublemakers to recover stolen coins}} ** {{event|Collect as many casino coins as possible before time runs out!}} '''Round 2''' *** {{event|Clear out the gang of troublemakers to recover stolen coins}} ** {{event|Collect as many casino coins as possible before time runs out!}} '''Round 3''' *** {{event|Clear out the gang of troublemakers to recover stolen coins}} ** {{event|Stop the choya piñata before it gets away!}} ;Bounties * {{event|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Braek Baredfang)|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Braek Baredfang)}} * {{event|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Butch)|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Butch)}} * {{event|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Chaotic Leyspark)|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Chaotic Leyspark)}} * {{event|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Chief Kronon)|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Chief Kronon)}} * {{event|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Forged Ambusher)|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Forged Ambusher)}} * {{event|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Forged Maverick)|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Forged Maverick)}} * {{event|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Forged Punisher)|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Forged Punisher)}} * {{event|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Forged Sorcerer)|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Forged Sorcerer)}} * {{event|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Man-Eater)|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Man-Eater)}} * {{event|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Scragglebeard)|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Scragglebeard)}} * {{event|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Shardcrest)|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Shardcrest)}} * {{event|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Tazula Mindclouder)|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Tazula Mindclouder)}} * {{event|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Uussh Visshta)|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Uussh Visshta)}} * {{event|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Xedra Tahz Tahom)|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Xedra Tahz Tahom)}} * {{event|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Zelke the Shameless)|Defeat the champion bounty (Champion Zelke the Shameless)}} * {{event|Defeat the Legendary bounty (Legendary Distraught Choya)|Defeat the Legendary bounty (Legendary Distraught Choya)}} * {{event|Defeat the Legendary bounty (Legendary Queen Yidaxu)|Defeat the Legendary bounty (Legendary Queen Yidaxu)}} * {{event|Defeat the Legendary bounty (Legendary Corrupted Facet)|Defeat the Legendary bounty (Legendary Corrupted Facet)}} ;Other events * {{event|Defeat the champion (Champion Wurm Queen)}} * {{event|Defeat the Champion Branded hydra}} * {{event|Defeat the Forged raiding party}} * {{event|Defend the Amnoon farm workers from the Forged}} * {{event|Defend the refugee caravan}} * {{event|Defend the village of Kweli from the Forged}} ** {{event|Reclaim the village of Kweli from the Forged}} ** {{event|Stop the Zaishen from desecrating the Temple of Kormir}} * {{event|Defend the Water Authority facility workers as they repair damaged water pipes}} * {{event|Defend the Water Authority plant from Hamaseen saboteurs}} * {{event|Disrupt the Forged ritual and destroy the crucible}} ** {{event|Kill the Forged commander}} * {{event|Drive back Balthazar's forces before they wear down the makeshift militia}} * {{event|Escort refugees from the Temple of Kormir to the southern way station}} * {{event|Help Ashwah search for his missing daughter in the Brand}} * {{event|Help Nasim gather fish from the bay}} * {{event|Help Olaf recover buried artifacts}} * {{event|Help Priest Bashshar get healers and medical supplies to refugees at the Temple of Kormir}} * {{event|Help repair leaks in the Amnoon Water Authority pipes}} * {{event|Help Salima gather stone and protect quarriers from the choya}} * {{event|Help Talib recover his escaped sand shark pups}} * {{event|Help the emboldened refugees reach the oasis settlement}} * {{event|Mount up and herd the stray cattle back to their pen}} * {{event|Prepare for a race around the desert}} ** {{event|Reach the finish line! (Crystal Oasis)}} * {{event|Recover the sunken Consortium cargo polluting Amnoon's harbor}} * {{event|Rescue refugees forced into labor in the Zephyrite mine}} * {{event|Scavenge supplies from the clifftop Zephyrite ruins}} * {{event|See the refugees safely through to Amnoon}} * {{event|Stop the caffeinated skritt burglar before it escapes with the treasure}} * {{event|Stop the stampede of choya before they break down the gate}} ;[[Priory Historian Elisa]]'s events * {{event|Gather wood for the fire for an Experience boost}} * {{event|Gather wood for the fire for a Karma boost}} * {{event|Gather wood for the fire for a Magic Find boost}} == Map bonus rewards == {{map bonus reward}} == Pets == ;[[Juvenile Sand Lion]] * [[Kusini Crossing]] — East of the [[Southern Way Station]] * [[Mekele Bluffs]] * [[Omiramba Sand Sea]] — Southwest of the [[Northern Way Station]] near a group of trees * [[Sifuri Sand Sea]] — Below a tree west of the [[Wind-Worn Bottle]] hero challenge == Crafting resources == ;Resource nodes : {{gathering icon|plant}} [[Mussels]] : {{gathering icon|plant}} [[Lentils]] : {{gathering icon|plant}} [[Clam]] : {{gathering icon|plant}} [[Desert Vegetables]] : {{gathering icon|plant}} [[Cluster of Desert Herbs]] : {{gathering icon|plant}} [[Flax]] : {{gathering icon|plant}} [[Coral]] : {{gathering icon|plant}} [[Potato]] : {{gathering icon|wood}} [[Ancient Sapling]] : {{gathering icon|wood}} [[Mebahya Sapling]] : {{gathering icon|mine}} [[Mithril Ore (node)|Mithril Ore]] : {{gathering icon|mine}} [[Orichalcum Ore (node)|Orichalcum Ore]] : {{gathering icon|mine}} [[Granite Lode|Rich Granite Lode]] == Trivia == * "Crystal Oasis" is the name of a piece from the original ''Guild Wars'' [[soundtrack]]. {{Zone nav}} [[de:Kristalloase]] [[es:Oasis de Cristal]] [[fr:Oasis de cristal]]
